Effects: Before doing damage, discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Galarian Moltres V
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a [D] Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon. You can't use more than 1 Direflame Wings Ability each turn.
Effects: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Arceus VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, you may search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: Search your deck for up to 3 basic Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon V in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Magma Basin
Description: Once during each player's turn, that player may attach a [R] Energy card from their discard pile to 1 of their Benched [R] Pokémon. If a player attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, put 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

Name: Ultra Ball
Description: You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand. Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Flareon
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon has a Memory Capsule attached, [G] Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

Name: Vaporeon
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon has a Memory Capsule attached, [R] Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

Name: Octillery
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Rapid Strike card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. You can't use more than 1 Rapid Strike Search Ability each turn.

Name: Jolteon
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon has a Memory Capsule attached, [W] Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

Name: Zekrom
Effects: This Pokémon also does 60 damage to itself. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Name: Dusknoir
Ability-Effect: All Special Energy attached to Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) provide [C] Energy and have no other effect.

Name: Dedenne
Effects: If your opponent has exactly 1 Prize card remaining, this attack does 60 more damage, and your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

Name: Ariados
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Evolution Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Name: Alcremie
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your turn does not end when you use Café Master.
Effects: This attack does 40 more damage for each type of basic Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

Name: Eevee
Effects: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon V, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Houndoom
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Single Strike Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Single Strike Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, put 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

Name: Oranguru
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may switch a card from your hand with the top card of your deck.

Name: Boltund V
Effects: Search your deck for up to 2 [L] Energy cards and attach them to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.
This attack does 30 more damage for each [L] Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Sylveon V
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for an Item card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Sylveon VMAX
Effects: Attach an Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, heal 120 damage from that Pokémon.
This attack does 30 more damage for each different type of Pokémon on your Bench.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Mimikyu V
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may prevent all damage done to this Mimikyu V by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon until the end of your opponent's next turn.
Effects: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon for each Prize card your opponent has taken.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Mimikyu VMAX
Effects: Put 4 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like. If you played Acerola's Premonition from your hand during this turn, place 13 damage counters instead.
Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Single Strike Urshifu V
Effects: Search your deck for up to 2 [F] Energy cards and attach them to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.
During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Impact Blow.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Single Strike Urshifu VMAX
Effects: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Rapid Strike Urshifu V
Effects: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Rapid Strike Urshifu VMAX
Effects: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 120 more damage.
Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Umbreon V
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.
If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 80 more damage.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Acerola's Premonition
Description: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you draw a card for each Trainer card you find there.

Name: Umbreon VMAX
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Café Master
Description: Choose up to 3 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a different type of basic Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. Your turn ends.

Name: Gloria
Description: Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Pokémon that don't have a Rule Box and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck. (Pokémon V, Pokémon-GX, etc. have Rule Boxes. )

Name: Rapid Strike Style Mustard
Description: You can play this card only when it is the last card in your hand. Put a Rapid Strike Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench. If you do, draw 5 cards.

Name: Single Strike Style Mustard
Description: You can play this card only when it is the last card in your hand. Search your deck for a Single Strike Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck. If you searched your deck in this way, draw 5 cards.

Name: Single Strike Urshifu VMAX
Effects: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Rapid Strike Urshifu VMAX
Effects: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 120 more damage.
Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.
